_comment: PROVISIONAL model-calibration scaffold (UX_APP_DEV_SPEC.md §4.C / §10). These are FOLDABLE constants, NOT final physics. EXVANOS_BASE(rpm) was fitted at the 268/264 cams; the engine was since corrected to the stock 260/260 cams and real measured intake dimensions are pending, so this fit MUST be re-fitted. The UX (dims -> Run -> metrics -> Tune -> export) does NOT depend on these final values, only on the model being stable/sweepable. Each Run record logs the calib block (alpha,w) so a future re-fit is traceable. Env vars (OPENWAM_MOUTH_RAD / _W / OPENWAM_EXVANOS_BASE / _SCALE) still override at runtime for studies.

exvanos_base._comment: FOLDED to the stable datum for M1 (§4.C 'foldable scaffold'). The per-rpm WOT shape-fit `points` below was fitted at 268-deg cams and is now STALE (cams corrected to 260; it destabilizes 3900 -> diverges at cyc ~23). use_stale_shape_fit=false folds EXVANOS_BASE to wot_base_stable=150 (the validated-stable baseline), so the model is stable/sweepable. Shape won't fully match stock until the real-geometry re-fit (M2); re-enable the shape-fit then.
